model.select_prompt:
🧠 Current model: {current}
Select a model to switch to:
auto_approve.enabled: ✅ Auto-approve ON — all tool requests will be approved automatically
auto_approve.disabled: ❌ Auto-approve OFF — back to manual review
watchdog.busy: ⏳ Processing... new messages will be read later
watchdog.ack_log: User acknowledged wait, Claude continues processing
watchdog.interrupt_log: User interrupted Claude's current task — re-injecting message
watchdog.diag_idle: 🔄 Claude was idle but didn't reply, auto re-injected message
watchdog.diag_hook_pending: ⏳ Permission approval card already on EClaw, waiting for your click
watchdog.diag_crashed: 🔄 Claude Code session appears unresponsive, may need to restart eclaw-bot tmux session
watchdog.diag_busy: ⏳ Claude is working on a task, your second message is queued
error.reply_failed: ⚠️ EClaw reply failed ({error}). Check if bridge needs restart (re-register + bind to get fresh botSecret). Run: curl -s http://localhost:18800/health to verify bridge state.
error.no_device: ⚠️ Cannot reply: missing deviceId/entityId. Bridge may not have completed EClaw registration. Wait or restart bridge.
context.warning: ⚠️ Context near capacity ({pct}% until auto-compact). Please finish current task ASAP — bridge will auto-/clear after. Avoid reading large files or starting Playwright sessions.
context.auto_clear: 🧹 Context at {pct}% — bridge auto-executing /clear to free space.
reply_enforcer.nudge: ⚠️ You haven't called reply tool for {minutes} minutes (user msg: "{preview}"). Please call reply tool **immediately** with a brief acknowledgment, then continue your task. Do NOT use Playwright to click EClaw UI buttons — reply tool is the correct channel reply mechanism.
